title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Nami, Luffy, Loki as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'll be pirate King's left hand in the flesh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would we fight you over the key, old-timer?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sir ya, what are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? Don't think you can take it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did you know my father's human, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used to be a pirate, and he didn't fear anyone, not even the warriors of Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, old man! The sooner we get back to LOKi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the sooner we get back to the feast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nice straw hat you've got there!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
